channel.title: Apps on HopoZ Site
channel.description: Recent content in Apps on HopoZ Site

item.title: idea
item.author: phmath41@gmail.com (HopoZ)
item.description: Plugin org.apache.maven.plugins:maven-jar-plugin:1.8.1 or one of its dependencies could not be resolved: Failure to find org.apache.maven.plugins:maven-jar-plugin:jar:1.8.1 in https://maven.aliyun.com/repository/public was cached in the local repository, resolution will not be reattempted until the update interval of aliyunmaven has elapsed or updates are forced -> [Help 1] [ERROR] default settings，setting只是对当前项目进行

item.title: nvim
item.author: phmath41@gmail.com (HopoZ)
item.description: Language Server Protocol (LSP) 在 Neovim 中运行 :PackerSync 命令来安装或更新插件

item.title: tmux
item.author: phmath41@gmail.com (HopoZ)
item.description: tmux是一个流行的终端复用器，它允许用户在一个终端窗口中运行多个终端会话，并且可以不间断地在它们之间切换。tmux对于远程工作、长期运行的

item.title: ubuntu
item.author: phmath41@gmail.com (HopoZ)
item.description: 快照 CRLF Carriage Return Line Feed 回车换行符，*unix上是LF touch filename 生成新文件 ENOENT Error NO ENTity

item.title: vscode
item.author: phmath41@gmail.com (HopoZ)
item.description: 已经实现： cpg生成C++常用结构snippets ctrl+j生成新空白行,ctrl+l相当于右箭头 用he按tab生成[]() 笔记使用相对引
